creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
Luca Lesinigo wrote:
> 
> >Fix:
> Maybe just adding autoconf to the dependencies of wget? it should do the trick...

try this patch (not tested).

Index: /usr/ports/ftp/wget/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/ftp/wget/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.43
diff -u -r1.43 Makefile
--- /usr/ports/ftp/wget/Makefile	2001/09/11 13:17:09	1.43
+++ /usr/ports/ftp/wget/Makefile	2001/10/06 05:19:10
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-ssl=${OPENSSLBASE}
 .endif
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
-GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_AUTOCONF=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV+=	CPPFLAGS=-I${LOCALBASE}/include \
 		LIBS=-L${LOCALBASE}/lib \
 		MSGFMT=${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt-new \

Cyrille.
-- 
Cyrille Lefevre                 mailto:clefevre@citeweb.net
